title: stipa effusa
intro: Stipa effusa, also known as the spreading needle grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stipa effusa include its potential to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Stipa effusa often involve infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or taken as tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
